name: Marvelous Fresh Ginger Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 large Egg white beaten till frothy
recipeInstructions:
1. Crust: Mix pecans with brown sugar, egg white, and lemon zest until the mixture is just bound together. Press into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Filling: Beat cream cheese and sugar together until smooth and light. Add eggs, heavy cream, vanilla extract, ginger preserves, ground ginger, and fresh ginger. Mix thoroughly and pour into the prepared nut crust.
3. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour and 40 minutes.
4. Cool completely in the turned-off oven or overnight before chilling in the refrigerator.
5. If serving at home, remove the springform band from the pan and place it on a serving tray or dish. Garnish with candied ginger. This recipe needs one day to mellow. Serve in very thin wedges – very rich. It would be delightful served with fresh sliced ripe juicy peaches alongside.
